name: json-formatter
body:
# JSON Formatter

Use `format_json` with mode='pretty', 'minify', or 'validate'.

tools.name: format_json
tools.description: Format, minify or validate JSON input
tools.handler: try { const o = JSON.parse(input.text); if (input.mode === 'validate') return 'valid'; if (input.mode === 'minify') return JSON.stringify(o); return JSON.stringify(o, null, 2); } catch (e) { return 'Invalid JSON: ' + e.message; }
